title: Public Officials / Governance and Administrative Framework
description: Municipal governance and administrative framework, covering departmental functions, ethical standards, penalties, transparency and accountability systems, PESO and PLEB operations, official municipal ordinances and symbols and other governance related provisions promoting responsible public service and institutional integrity.

articles.title: Declaration of Policy
articles.summary: Public accountability, professionalism, transparency, ethics, and public trust.

sections.title: Declaration of Policy
sections.content: Public office is a public trust. Officials shall serve with integrity, accountability, loyalty, efficiency, and professionalism.

articles.title: Norms of Conduct
articles.summary: Commitment to public interest, professionalism, political neutrality, and responsiveness.

sections.title: Commitment to Public Interest
sections.content: Officials shall prioritize public welfare over personal interest.

sections.title: Professionalism
sections.content: Public officials shall demonstrate competence, dedication, and fairness.

articles.title: Duties and Responsibilities
articles.summary: Functions, responsibilities, service standards, and accountability systems.

sections.title: Functions and Responsibilities
sections.content: Municipal officials shall perform their duties with accountability, efficiency, and dedication to public service.

articles.title: Ethical Standards
articles.summary: Conflict of interest, gifts, confidentiality, and prohibited acts.

sections.title: Conflict of Interest
sections.content: Public officials shall avoid financial and personal interests that conflict with public duties.

sections.title: Gifts and Benefits
sections.content: Acceptance of gifts, favors, or benefits that may influence official acts is prohibited.

sections.title: Confidential Information
sections.content: Confidential government information shall not be used for private advantage or unauthorized disclosure.

articles.title: Transparency
articles.summary: SALN, financial disclosure, public records, and accountability.

sections.title: Statement of Assets
sections.content: Officials shall file declarations of assets, liabilities, and financial interests in accordance with law.

sections.title: Public Access to Records
sections.content: Records and official transactions shall remain accessible subject to lawful confidentiality.

sections.title: Transparency Measures
sections.content: Municipal offices shall promote open, transparent, and accountable governance.

articles.title: Conflict of Interest
articles.summary: Divestment, private interests, business restrictions, and ethical compliance.

sections.title: Conflict of Interest
sections.content: Officials shall divest from private interests that conflict with public duties and shall comply with business restriction requirements.

sections.title: Penalties
sections.content: Violations of ethical standards and conduct rules may result in administrative, civil, and criminal liabilities as provided by law.

articles.title: Department Heads
articles.summary: Municipal Treasurer, Assessor, MPDC, Engineer, Health Officer, MSWDO and others.

sections.title: Department Heads
sections.content: The municipality shall have department heads including the Municipal Treasurer, Municipal Assessor, Municipal Planning and Development Coordinator, Municipal Engineer, Municipal Health Officer, Municipal Social Welfare and Development Officer, and other department heads as may be provided by law.

articles.title: Travel Orders
articles.summary: Official travel authorization, procedures, and accountability.

sections.title: Travel Orders
sections.content: Official travel of municipal officials and employees shall be covered by travel orders duly approved by the competent authority.

articles.title: Drug Testing
articles.summary: Mandatory testing, rehabilitation, penalties, and confidentiality.

sections.title: Drug Testing
sections.content: Mandatory drug testing shall be conducted for municipal officials and employees. Rehabilitation programs and penalties shall be provided for those found positive.

articles.title: Legal Assistance Fund
articles.summary: Funding, coverage, legal support, and implementation.

sections.title: Legal Assistance Fund
sections.content: A legal assistance fund shall be established to provide legal support to municipal officials and employees in connection with the performance of their official duties.

articles.title: PESO (Public Employment Service Office)
articles.summary: Employment facilitation, labor market information, and youth employment.

sections.title: PESO
sections.content: The Public Employment Service Office (PESO) shall facilitate employment, provide labor market information, and implement youth employment programs.

articles.title: PLEB (People's Law Enforcement Board)
articles.summary: People's Law Enforcement Board, citizen complaints, jurisdiction and funding.

sections.title: PLEB
sections.content: The People's Law Enforcement Board (PLEB) shall hear citizen complaints against law enforcement officers within its jurisdiction.

articles.title: Official Seal
articles.summary: Seal usage, custody, prohibited acts, and penalties.

sections.title: Official Seal
sections.content: The official seal of the Municipality of Santa, Ilocos Sur shall be used only for official purposes. Unauthorized use or reproduction is prohibited and subject to penalties.
